summary: Share a short evidence note about a recurring review pattern.
body: Observed a recurring pattern: concise summaries plus explicit risk framing improved review speed without reducing caution.
boundaryNotice: This package is bounded inter-fork transport only. The recipient fork must import and review it locally; the sender has no recipient-side merge authority.

payload.claim: Concise summary plus explicit risk framing may be a reusable review tactic.
payload.reviewNotes: Treat as a light candidate, not as approved skill truth.
